location: Not a guaranteed pickup — it's a rare drop (10% base rate, improved to 17.5% with the Silver Scarab talisman at +75 Discovery) from Guardian Golems wielding a bow. The most efficient farm is the pair of Guardian Golems standing just past the top of the Grand Lift of Dectus on the Altus Plateau side — one carries a Golem Halberd, the other this Greatbow.

source.name: Guardian Golem (archer variant), Grand Lift of Dectus

tactics: Ride the Grand Lift of Dectus up from Liurnia; the elevator drops you right behind the two Guardian Golems on the Altus side.
Ignore or bait the Halberd Golem's wide melee sweeps and focus the bow-wielding Golem — its explosive great arrows hit hard from range, so close the distance or use cover rather than trading shots.
Rest at the nearby grace to reset the encounter and repeat, since the drop is not guaranteed even after killing it.
lore: A greatbow of black stone salvaged from an extinct civilization's Guardian Golem constructs. Its draw weight is so extreme that only a golem's inhuman strength — or an exceptionally powerful warrior — can use it as a weapon rather than a fixed siege piece.

builds.name: Pure Strength colossal archer
builds.why: Strength scaling starts at D and climbs to C by +5 with only E-scaling Dexterity, rewarding a heavy Strength investment the same way colossal melee weapons do.

builds.name: Strength tank/archer hybrid
builds.why: At 14.5 weight and 24 STR/18 DEX requirements it slots naturally alongside a heavy-armor Strength melee build without needing a separate stat spread.
